title: Binance Cascade/Regime Scientific Collaboration 50
thesis: Detect fragile market states and liquidation cascades early enough to survive and exploit dislocations. This variant fuses econometrics researcher guidance with statistical physics researcher, control/rl researcher to test stability-aware factor combinations and regime-conditioned edge persistence; phase-transition detection and cascade susceptibility before dislocations accelerate; feedback-aware thresholding and action policies that stay robust under execution drift.
guardrails: No live promotion without human approval.
No credentials or hard caps may be mutated.
